testcase.name: seedIndustries > creates 56 industries on first run
seedIndustries > is idempotent: re-seed creates 0 new records
seedMockIpAccounts > creates 5 mock IP accounts on first run
seedMockIpAccounts > is idempotent: re-seed creates 0 new accounts
INDUSTRIES constant (IndustryDropdown source) > contains exactly 56 industries
INDUSTRIES constant (IndustryDropdown source) > contains industries in all 5 categories with correct counts
INDUSTRIES constant (IndustryDropdown source) > all industries have required key, label, emoji, and category fields
